rationale: Both notes indicate a shared spillover theme in marketing (citing: social spillovers from CRM campaigns; cited: cross-category spillovers from advertising/promotions under umbrella branding), so the citation could be conceptually relevant. But the matched evidence is only a single DOI-level match with no in-text context or reference string, and the study contexts/methods are quite different. This is not safely droppable as an obvious mention-only citation, but current evidence is too sparse to clearly keep.
